backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Moritz Care Home backend, defining data types (Resident, Medication, Physician, etc.) and including authorization and blob-storage mixins with a hardcoded admin principal and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms stored user profiles from the old shape (name, employeeId) to the new shape (name, employeeId, role) by defaulting role to 'user'.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, primarily covering fixes for indefinite loading/hanging issues in the frontend startup and profile-loading flow.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key fixes, and notable implementation details.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_CHECKLIST.md: Comprehensive production deployment checklist covering pre-deployment verification, three deployment options (manual, redeploy script, clean rebuild), post-deployment smoke tests, and rollback procedures for the Moritz Care Home application.
frontend/deployment_logs/.gitkeep: Documentation file describing the deployment_logs directory, which stores timestamped deployment logs and canister ID artifacts generated by the redeploy and clean_redeploy production scripts.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_VERSION_89.md: Historical deployment and smoke-test checklist specific to Version 89, preserved for reference, with a notice directing current deployments to the general DEPLOYMENT_CHECKLIST.md.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML template for the Moritz Care Home application that mounts the React app into a div#root element and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/public/build-meta.json: Placeholder JSON file for build metadata (version, commit, timestamp) that deployment scripts overwrite with actual values at build time.
frontend/scripts/clean_redeploy_producti: Bash script that performs a clean production redeployment by removing prior build artifacts and Vite caches, injecting build metadata and backend canister ID into a .env file, rebuilding the frontend, and deploying to the Internet Computer network.
frontend/scripts/deploy_version_89_publi: Historical Version 89-specific deployment retry script that builds the frontend, deploys to the IC network, and saves canister IDs to a timestamped log file; preserved for reference only.
frontend/scripts/post_deploy_smoke_test_: Interactive bash script that guides operators through post-deployment smoke tests by verifying deployment artifacts, extracting canister IDs and build metadata, and prompting confirmation of key UI functionality checks.
frontend/scripts/redeploy_production.sh: Bash script that builds the frontend with environment variables (backend canister ID, build metadata) and deploys it to the Internet Computer production network, logging all steps to a timestamped file.
frontend/scripts/restart_backend_caniste: Bash script that checks the IC backend canister status and either starts it (if stopped) or performs a full stop/start cycle depending on the mode argument passed.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_VERSION_89.md: Post-deployment smoke test checklist for Version 89 of the Moritz Care Home application, covering login page access, Internet Identity authentication, dashboard loading, and other core functionality verification steps.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages multi-phase app startup (initializing, connecting, loading-profile, dashboard, login, error) with watchdog timeouts, health checks, and routing between LoginPage, Dashboard, and ProfileSetup.
frontend/src/components/AddAdlRecordDial: Modal dialog component for adding an Activities of Daily Living (ADL) record for a resident, with selects for activity type and assistance level and a date input.
frontend/src/components/AddDailyVitalsDi: Modal dialog component for recording daily vital signs (temperature, blood pressure, pulse, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, blood glucose) for a resident, converting Fahrenheit to Celsius before submission.
frontend/src/components/AddMarRecordDial: Modal dialog component for adding a Medication Administration Record (MAR) for a resident, allowing selection of an active medication, administration time, and the staff member who administered it.
frontend/src/components/AddMedicationDia: A dialog component for adding a new medication to a resident's record, with fields for name, dosage, administration times/route, and notes, using the useAddMedication mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddResidentDialo: A dialog component for creating a new resident with comprehensive fields including personal info, room assignment, physicians, responsible persons, medications, pharmacy, and insurance details.
frontend/src/components/AddWeightEntryDi: A dialog component for recording a weight measurement entry for a resident, capturing weight value, unit (lbs/kg), measurement date, and optional notes.
frontend/src/components/BrandLogo.tsx: Renders the Moritz Care Home logo image with configurable size and square/rectangular display modes, falling back to a text abbreviation if the image fails to load.
frontend/src/components/DiagnosticsIndic: A tooltip-based indicator button that displays backend canister connection status and build metadata, showing warnings when the canister ID is not configured.
frontend/src/components/EditMedicationDi: A dialog component for editing an existing medication record, pre-populating fields from the provided medication object and submitting updates via the useUpdateMedication mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/EditResidentDial: A dialog component for editing an existing resident's full profile, including personal info, physicians, medications, pharmacy, insurance, and responsible persons, using form state and the useUpdateResident mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A one-time profile setup form that collects a user's full name and employee ID, then calls useSaveCallerUserProfile to register them before invoking an onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/StartupErrorScre: A full-screen error display shown during startup failures, rendering contextual guidance based on error type (network, stopped canister, not found) along with health check results, backend diagnostics, and retry/logout actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query-based hook that creates and caches a backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializes access control with an optional admin token, and invalidates all dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage ICP AuthClient lifecycle, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks and local TypeScript types for the frontend, covering user profile, residents, medications, vitals, ADL records, and other backend data operations via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useResilientActor.ts: A resilient variant of useActor that wraps actor creation and admin initialization in timeouts, suppresses non-fatal errors, and exposes error/refetch state for startup diagnostics.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark CSS custom properties using oklch colors, overrides Radix dialog styles for solid backgrounds, and includes print-specific layout styles.
frontend/src/lib/actorInit.ts: Provides utility functions for resilient backend actor initialization, including timeout wrapping and error classification helpers for stopped canisters, network errors, timeouts, and not-found conditions.
frontend/src/lib/assetUrl.ts: Exports a single helper function that constructs base-path-safe URLs for public assets using Vite's BASE_URL, handling edge cases like double slashes.
frontend/src/lib/buildInfo.ts: Reads Vite-injected build-time constants (build ID, build time, git commit) and exposes them via a getBuildInfo function, returning nulls when metadata is unavailable.
frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.ts: Provides date conversion utilities between YYYY-MM-DD strings, nanosecond bigint/number timestamps used by the backend, and human-readable formatted strings, including an age calculator.
frontend/src/lib/registrationErrorMappin: Maps backend registration and bootstrap errors into user-friendly English messages, distinguishing anonymous access, network issues, timeouts, stopped canisters, and authorization failures.
frontend/src/lib/residentEnumMapping.ts: Defines mapping functions between frontend string values and backend RoomType/ResidentStatus enums, with backward-compatible aliases.
frontend/src/lib/startupDiagnostics.ts: Provides backend diagnostics extraction from Vite environment variables and a performHealthCheck function that calls the backend canister's healthCheck query with a configurable timeout.
frontend/src/lib/startupTimings.ts: Centralizes all startup sequence timeout constants (actor creation, admin init, health check, watchdog, profile query) in milliseconds for easy tuning.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying active and discharged residents in tabs with cards, supporting discharge and permanent delete actions via confirmation dialogs, and admin-gated controls.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with a teal-overlaid background image and a card prompting users to authenticate via Internet Identity, showing a loading spinner during the login process.
frontend/src/pages/ResidentProfile.tsx: Detailed resident profile page showing personal info, medications, MAR/ADL records, and vitals in tabs, with edit dialogs and admin-gated actions, plus loading/error states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens for colors, border radius, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues (startup/connection problems, canister ID misconfiguration), and a list of existing feature implementations related to frontend startup diagnostics and backend connectivity.
